sizing_rule.note: Use optimal f (constant fraction of bankroll) calculated for each independent system/trade. For dependent trials, adjust f for dependency. When combining multiple independent systems, scale positions by ratio of individual optimal f to combined bankroll (e.g., 1 contract per 4 units). Formula: Position Size = (Current Bankroll × optimal_f) / Risk per Unit. Optimal f must be calculated separately for each system based on its specific P&L distribution.

source_rule_text: Use optimal f (the constant fraction of your bankroll) for each trade as if that trade will be repeated infinitely, adjusting for dependency when applicable.
